rationale: This is a Dragon Ball Z anime IP hook (Goku SSJ3 Dragon Fist) with gold/indigo/purple combat palette — it has zero overlap with Flip & Dive 3D's minimalist pastel-blue pool diving aesthetic, ragdoll humor tone, or timing/aiming core loop. Repurposing licensed anime IP also carries serious legal/ASA risk and would mislead users into installing a physics arcade, tanking IPM and retention. Hard pass; do not adapt unless reframed as a generic "power-up dive" trick with original art, which would no longer resemble this archetype.
